blast_radius: none on existing production code paths; new test file is additive only. If a real bug is found during the mandatory real -race run, the fix will be scoped to the minimal offending function in engine/catalog, engine/wal, or engine/mvcc and called out explicitly in the commit message and handoff.

risk_areas.area: goroutine-leak false positive from GC/scheduler noise
risk_areas.mitigation: compare NumGoroutine with a generous worker-count-relative slack, not an exact equality, and run runtime.GC() + brief settle delay before both start and end snapshots

risk_areas.area: memory growth false positive from legitimate steady-state bookkeeping (catalog records, WAL segments, mvcc version files) accumulated during a real multi-minute ingestion workload
risk_areas.mitigation: assert a generous ceiling multiple on heap growth (documented rationale in-code) rather than near-zero growth; log actual before/after numbers regardless of pass/fail so the numbers are inspectable
SOAK_DURATION env var overridable; default kept short (session-practical minutes) so default `go test ./...` runs stay fast; test also gated by testing.Short() skip like 6.3.4's scale test

rollback_plan: New test-only file; revert by deleting engine/loadtest/soak_test.go (single git revert of the commit) with no production-code impact, unless a real fix file was also added, in which case that fix is reverted independently and called out in the commit message.
